profitMargin.description: Fraction of the pot the server keeps (0 = no server fee, 0.99 = server keeps 99%)

maxTicketsPerPlayer.description: Maximum tickets a single player can hold for one draw

minimumParticipants.description: Minimum number of unique players required to proceed with the draw

announceTicketPurchases.description: Whether to broadcast ticket purchases to all players

rolloverOnCancel.description: When true, pot rolls over to the next draw instead of refunding players on cancellation
